name: LNG Supply Shock
description: Klaipėda LNG terminal offline (maintenance or supply disruption). 3.75 bcm/year capacity lost.

overrides.rationale: Terminal offline — FSRU maintenance or LNG supply disruption

expected_impacts.LT: Primary gas supply lost. Falls back to GIPL (Poland) and Inčukalns storage (Latvia).
expected_impacts.EE: Reduced gas availability through north-south pipeline.

historical_reference: No historical precedent — Klaipėda has been continuously operational. Scenario is exploratory.
